name: Mini Artichoke Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the artichokes in boiling salted water for 20-35 minutes, until tender. Drain well and cool.
2. Remove the center and scrape out the choke with a spoon. Trim the base to set the artichokes upright.
3. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter. Whisk in the flour and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Gradually whisk in the heated milk. Heat and stir until thickened.
5. Stir in the cheese and season with salt and pepper. Remove from heat and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
6. Beat the egg yolks in a bowl. Fold in the egg whites.
7. Spoon the mixture into the artichokes and stand upright in a greased casserole dish.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes, until fully risen and lightly browned.
9. Serve hot in individual bowls.
